user.title: Rain Warner Setup
user.description: Configure your rain radar monitoring location. Coordinates default to your Home Assistant home location.

data_description.radius: Area around your location to monitor for precipitation (1-50 km)
data_description.data_source: Auto picks DWD inside Germany and Open-Meteo elsewhere. DWD Radar is the highest precision option for Germany. Bright Sky is a JSON wrapper around DWD. Open-Meteo provides global coverage.
data_description.nowcast_engine: Engine that extends the forecast beyond DWD's 2h horizon. Simple uses a stdlib motion estimator. pysteps adds Lucas-Kanade flow + cascade decomposition + lifecycle modelling for noticeably better 2-6h forecasts on x86/Intel hardware. Picking pysteps triggers an automatic dependency install on first setup (30-60s on HA OS); falls back to the simple engine if the install fails.

error.invalid_coordinates: Invalid coordinates. Latitude must be between -90 and 90, longitude between -180 and 180.
